About First Aid Plumbing Specialist INC

12+ years serving Houston and surrounding areas

First Aid Plumbing Specialist INC was founded over a decade ago right here in Houston. We saw a need for plumbers who not only knew their trade but also understood the unique challenges Houston homes face – from aging infrastructure to the constant threat of flooding and humidity.

Our approach is simple: diagnose accurately, communicate clearly, and execute flawlessly. We believe in transparent pricing, honest advice, and lasting solutions, not quick fixes. We treat every home as if it were our own, ensuring minimal disruption and maximum satisfaction.

We're proud to be part of the Houston community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to be a responsible neighbor. Our commitment extends beyond pipes and fixtures; it's about building lasting relationships and contributing to a thriving Houston.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
First Aid Plumbing Specialist INC

Trusted plumber professionals serving Houston, TX and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
